body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
We should only get the `config_dict` and `job_id` from the parsed args, everything else should come from the config dict. Otherwise, they won't be properly processed when specified in the config dict (which is where we expect them to be defined)
title: use config dict for random seed and context

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
To facilitate debugging of AMIP simulations. We can use the existing diagnostics from ClimaLand - defined [here](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/blob/735590ec50b132de62601b68ad341ec33e64a331/src/diagnostics/default_diagnostics.jl#L52-L85) for the bucket.

## Content
- [x] update `bucket_init` to initialize diagnostics from ClimaLand
  - required interface change: pass artifacts directory to `bucket_init`
- [x] add ClimaDiagnostics to `experiments/ClimaEarth` environment

title: include bucket diagnostics
